title: LynAI Gate Token (v1.1)
description: Cryptographically-light signed verdict issued by agent.gatekeeper. Producer refuses to build any .docx without a valid token whose draft_content_hash matches the draft it's about to consume. This is the only way the gate decision can be honored; rejection of forged or unmatched tokens MUST be a hard error, not a warning.

draft_content_hash.description: MUST match scorecard.draft_content_hash AND the live draft markdown at Producer entry. Mismatch = hard reject.

decision.description: PASS only if rule_applied = strict_greater_than AND every dim > 9.5. DELIVER_WITH_SHORTFALL only if cycle_cap reached without convergence.

rule_applied.description: Echoes the locked rule from 00_DECISIONS.md §D-1. Producer verifies this matches its own constant.

shortfall_note.description: Required when decision = DELIVER_WITH_SHORTFALL. Enumerates failing dimensions and remediation.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256(token_id || draft_content_hash || decision, secret=GK_TOKEN_SECRET env). Producer re-computes and compares.

audit_chain.description: Optional: prior cycle tokens. Lets investigators trace how non-convergence happened.
